case_title: KATHERINE GISELLE ANDINO BARAHONA VS. MILTHON YOJANI SANDOVAL

docket_entries.description: ORDER CSE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ANDINO BARAHONA, KATHERINE GISELLE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, MILTHON YOJANI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $100.00 SERVED JAN-29-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, MILTHON YOJANI
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
